What We Do

Strategic FBA Solutions

Comprehensive support from the first sample to the final warehouse delivery.

Logistics & Prep

Full-spectrum supply chain management designed for high-volume Amazon sellers. From factory floor to FBA warehouse — handled.

  • DDP/FOB shipping & customs clearance
  • AQL 2.5/4.0 professional inspections
  • FNSKU labeling & poly-bagging
  • Sample consolidation from multiple vendors
  • Amazon-ready carton marking & documentation
Group Rates from $3,250/person

VIP Canton Fair Experience

An 8-day all-inclusive sourcing intensive led by veteran FBA sellers. Fly Cathay Pacific from Dallas — every detail handled from takeoff to touchdown.

  • Cathay Pacific round trip — Dallas to Guangzhou
  • 5-Star hotel with daily international buffet breakfast
  • Hotel-coordinated fair transfers & Didi Premium city transport
  • 3 days VIP Canton Fair guidance by FBA veterans
  • 2 days factory deep-dives with AQL quality audits
  • Shenzhen day via high-speed bullet train
  • Premium outlets shopping experience

Trip alumni receive 10% off all DDP shipping — for life. On $50K/year in shipments, that's $5,000 back annually.

The Irresistible Offer

Everything Included. Nothing Left to Chance.

We've obsessively curated every detail so you arrive in China as a buyer, not a tourist. Here's exactly what's inside your package — and what it would cost if you booked it yourself.

Cathay Pacific Round Trip — Dallas to Guangzhou
One of the world's top-rated airlines. Award-winning in-flight service and one of Asia's most reliable carriers — so you arrive refreshed and ready to negotiate.
Retail Value
$3,200
7 Nights — 5-Star Hotel with Full Buffet Breakfast
World-class accommodations steps from the Canton Fair. Your mornings start with an international buffet breakfast — fueling long days on the fair floor. Evening return to luxury, not a budget hostel.
Retail Value
$2,100
Daily Private Transport — Hotel to Canton Fair & Factory Visits
Private air-conditioned vehicle every single day. No rideshare apps, no language barriers, no wasted hours navigating an unfamiliar city. Your guide handles everything door-to-door.
Retail Value
$800
3-Day VIP Canton Fair Guidance by a Veteran FBA Seller
Navigate 200,000+ booths with someone who's done over $3M in FBA imports. We shortcut years of trial and error — identifying winning products, vetting suppliers on the spot, and negotiating prices most buyers never see.
Retail Value
$2,400
2-Day Curated Factory Deep-Dives with On-Site Quality Audit
Skip the middlemen. Walk the factory floor, inspect production lines, meet the actual manufacturer. Our bilingual team conducts AQL-standard quality checks in real time — so you leave with verified suppliers, not blind trust.
Retail Value
$1,800
BONUS
Shenzhen Day via Bullet Train — China's Silicon Valley for Sourcing
Board China's legendary high-speed bullet train — one of the world's fastest travel experiences — and arrive in Shenzhen in under an hour from Guangzhou. Then dive into Huaqiangbei Market and SEG Electronics Plaza, the world's largest electronics hub. If it's made in China, it was born here. Discover products your competitors haven't found yet.
Retail Value
$600
BONUS
Premium Outlets Shopping Day — China's Most Exclusive Retail Destinations
Experience China's premier outlet destinations — factory-direct luxury and branded goods at fractions of Western retail prices. Understand the real manufacturing economy from the inside. A cultural and commercial education you can't get from a YouTube video.
Retail Value
$400
BONUS
Lifetime 10% Discount on All DDP Shipping — Reserved for Trip Alumni
This is where the real ROI lives. Every shipment you send after this trip costs 10% less — forever. On a $50,000 annual shipping spend, that's $5,000 back in your pocket every year. Compounding savings that pay for this trip over and over.
Annual Value
$5,000+/yr
Total Retail Value
$16,300+

The Journey

8-Day VIP Itinerary

Your roadmap to sourcing dominance in Guangzhou — from Dallas to the world's largest trade fair.

Day 01
Dallas Departure
Pre-flight briefing and strategic alignment with our FBA experts. Review niche targets and supplier criteria.
Day 02
Guangzhou Arrival
VIP airport transfer and 5-star hotel check-in. Rest and recovery — your team is ready to debrief when you are.
Days 03 – 05
Canton Fair Prospecting
Guided navigation through 200,000+ exhibitors, focusing on your niche. Live vetting, sampling, and shortlisting of top suppliers.
Days 06 – 07
Factory Deep-Dives
On-site facility inspections with quality audits. Final production negotiation sessions with our bilingual team.
Day 08
Strategic Wrap-Up & Departure
Final procurement roadmap, logistics setup handoff, sample shipping arranged. Return flight to Dallas.
